title: Draft Shuttleworth Fellowship proposal for LICHEN 500-node deployment
description: Prepare a compelling fellowship application for Shuttleworth Foundation. Align the 500-node LICHEN deployment with their focus on open knowledge, freedom, innovation in public interest. Highlight the fellowship aspect: dedicated time for advancing decentralized mesh networking standards, open hardware, privacy-preserving comms. Include the core pitch, budget needs ($ for hardware, travel to conferences like DEFCON), expected impact (real-world validation of IETF-aligned protocols, community adoption). Reference current prototypes in rust/ and zephyr/. Follow their application process exactly. Prepare supporting docs.
close_reason: Shuttleworth fellowship proposal framework prepared using PRFAQ as base. Aligns with open knowledge and freedom focus.
